summary: Open tiled courtyard surrounded by brick walls; an elevated checkered sphere and white structures sit ahead-right. No clearly reachable table in current view; exploring forward.

dead_ends.reason: Robot barely moved in the last 30 frames while driving. Treat current heading as a dead end; turn away and explore elsewhere.

decision_log.observation: Large sphere obstacle ahead-center, brick walls on right and back, curved white wall and an opening on the left.
decision_log.outcome: Robot moves forward while curving left to explore the open area and avoid the central sphere.

decision_log.observation: Large textured sphere directly ahead in center of checkered floor, brick walls surrounding, window on right, curved light wall and gap on the left.
decision_log.outcome: Robot turns gently left, moving around the sphere toward unexplored left area.

decision_log.observation: Brick walls meeting in a corner, a large patterned sphere center-left, a window on the right wall, checkered floor. No table visible.
decision_log.outcome: Robot rotates left away from the corner, revealing more of the room to search for a table.

decision_log.observation: Brick walls form a corner ahead, large window upper-right, white curtain hanging center, checkered floor below. No table in view.
decision_log.outcome: Robot rotates left, revealing more of the room to search for a table.

decision_log.observation: Close-up of brick wall and a window frame with sky beyond; no floor or table visible, indicating I am near a wall.
decision_log.outcome: Robot rotates in place to face away from the wall and toward open room area.

decision_log.observation: Open checkered-tile area ahead; two tables with yellow chairs in center-right, brick wall on the left.
decision_log.outcome: Robot moves forward and turns slightly right, closing distance toward the nearest table.

decision_log.observation: Central silver cylinder ahead, big golf-ball-textured sphere on right, brick walls bordering the courtyard, smaller sphere on distant left.
decision_log.outcome: Robot turns gently left, moving past the cylinder while searching for a table.

decision_log.observation: Pedestal table with yellow items on the left, plus white furniture nearby; brick walls behind.
decision_log.outcome: Robot turns left and moves closer to the nearest table.

decision_log.observation: Mostly empty tiled floor in front; brick walls on left and right, white slanted structure and checkered sphere elevated ahead-right. No table at floor level visible.
decision_log.outcome: Move forward and slightly left across the open floor to search for a table.

constraints: Avoid colliding with the central sphere and brick walls
Avoid colliding with brick walls and the central sphere
Avoid colliding with brick walls and furniture
Avoid colliding with the central cylinder, large sphere, and brick walls
Avoid colliding with white furniture and brick walls while approaching the table
Avoid colliding with brick walls and the elevated checkered sphere structure
